title: blowing up water 2 - some details and background
description: A lot of work is being and has been done on this. Probably starting with Stan Meyer and Shakta Ganga. Panacea BOCAF have a great PDF that is well worth downloading and having a look as is Jean Naudin's website - look for his bingo fuel reactor and his cold fusion stuff - very interesting. Anyway hope you enjoy and any questions or responses i'd love to hear. Cheers. For anybody interested i have just set up a website - it's new - so not so good - but i'm getting there - the address is https://sites.google.com/site/aferlab/
